Location: Detroit, MIRemote: YesWilling to relocate: noTechnologies: Embedded systems, automotive, machine learning, signal processing, data science, real time computing, safety processes (MISRA, ISO26262, etc), MATLAB, FPGA.Resume: LinkedIn -- https://www.linkedin.com/in/wcunningEmail: wdocunningham \@\ gmail.comBackground: Masters in control theory and signal processing, working in the auto industry for the last 7 years, first on low level powertrain software then the last year or so on LIDAR/computer vision for autonomous vehicles.
